description: Hardened per owner ruling 2026-07-10: no pre-configured fs scope anywhere. Every fs permission below is command-enable ONLY (the plugin's scope is default-deny), so the only paths the app can read/write are the ones the user explicitly picks through the dialog plugin — picks are auto-granted into the fs scope at pick time and persisted across restarts by tauri-plugin-persisted-scope. Multiple input/output folders = multiple picks; grants accumulate. process is narrowed to restart (updater relaunch); exit is not granted.
